title: Site Family Skeleton
description: Skeleton only. Phase 1 Step 1 scaffold for the site family — site identity, naming, URL rules, project metadata, phase association, archive behavior. Not fully populated. Full extraction occurs in later Phase 1 steps (Phase 1 Step 4 — Per-Family Schema Population). Traces to Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy and Standard Project Site Template Contract §5, §6, plus Phase 0 Step 1 Consistency Check Register C-01 through C-06.
